_comment: Optional extra sources: any public iCalendar (.ics) feed of gigs — venue calendars, festival calendars, etc. Useful for vendors without an API (e.g. Tiketti-sold shows via a venue's own calendar). Each feed needs a url; label/venue/city/country/genre/lat/lon/website are optional metadata applied to its events. Feed events bypass the genre rules — adding the feed is the opt-in. Example entry: { "label": "Tavastia", "url": "https://example.com/events.ics", "venue": "Tavastia", "city": "Helsinki", "country": "FI", "genre": "Rock", "lat": 60.166, "lon": 24.932 }
